sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84690" key="polu/bwtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολῠ´-βωτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, prob. from <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βόσκω,</foreign> <sense id="n84690.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">many-feeding, ferlile,</tr_> as ironical epith. of the barren island of Seriphos, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:211" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">211</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
